name: Candy Rainbow Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Very warm water, plus 1 Tb
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients into the pan in the order listed.
2. Select sweet bread and push "Start."
3. At the "beep" (88 minutes into the cycle), add the candy.
- Use Multi-colored (Durkee-French) or Color Shots Decors from McCormick/Schilling.
4. Bake until done, then remove from the pan.
Note: This Funtastically delicious bread is pretty enough to frame and hang on the wall. It brightens any special occasion.
